strengths: Successfully completed the outbound transfer phase, moving all 6 pegs to the right side
Demonstrated proper mid-air transfer technique during the first half of the task
Maintained steady instrument control without excessive collisions or drops
weaknesses: Failed to complete the return transfer phase within the 300-second time limit
Appeared to lose momentum and efficiency during the second half of the task
Did not manage time effectively to ensure full task completion

drills.name: Complete cycle rehearsal
drills.description: Practice full outbound and return cycles with 3 pegs only, focusing on completing both directions within 2 minutes total
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the return transfer phase within time limit

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Perform 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, emphasizing consistent release and regrasp timing
drills.targets_weakness: Lost momentum and efficiency during second half

progression_note: At the novice level, focus on completing the full task cycle reliably before pursuing speed improvements. Practice with fewer pegs initially to build confidence in the complete sequence.
